---
title: "Yanai & Lercher 2020 T Demo"
format: html
filters:
  - tlang
---

# Introduction

This demo reproduces a workflow inspired by Yanai & Lercher (2020), involving image processing in **Python** and statistical plotting in **R**.

# Data Processing

The `gorilla_pixels` are extracted in Python and passed to R for cleaning.

```{t}
#| label: data-info
node_coords = read_node("coords")
print(str_join(["Cleaned coordinates path: ", node_coords.path]))
```

# Visualization

Nodes `plot1` and `plot2` generate visualizations in R based on the processed coordinates.

```{t}
#| label: plot-info
node_p1 = read_node("plot1")
print(str_join(["Plot 1 artifact path: ", node_p1.path]))
```

# Conclusion

T facilitates complex cross-language workflows involving image data, numerical computation, and high-quality visualization.
